description: Opening of a letter from Yaʿaqov b. Elʿazar al-Dijwār (דגואר) to Avraham Maimonides (r. 1205–1237 CE). The same person also appears in T-S 8J23.2 (PGPID 7699), a letter from Peraḥya b. Yosef. None of the content is preserved. AA
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
